target_model._note: v5 is tuned for Claude Fable 5. The Claude Code default model is set to fable[1m] in settings.json with an availableModels allowlist so a blocked default degrades to Opus 4.8 with a warning instead of failing.
target_model.thinking: always-on adaptive (budget_tokens rejected; control depth with effort)
target_model.refusal_stop_reason: cyber/bio safety classifier may return stop_reason=refusal; Claude Code ships built-in Opus 4.8 fallbacks

model_tiers._note: Alias-only. The Agent/Workflow model override accepts fable|opus|sonnet|haiku, NOT pinned minor versions. Do not hardcode 5.x/4.x numbers anywhere; they drift and cannot be passed.

v5_4_changes: v5.4.0 ATTENTION PUSHES: native macOS notifications for the two moments the terminal itself cannot carry — 'Claude needs you' (Notification hook: permission_prompt/idle_prompt/agent_needs_input/elicitation_dialog, with the CC message + project dir in the body) and 'Claude finished' when a turn ran past SUPERBOOST_PUSH_LONG_TURN_SEC (45s; `emit turn` stamps turnstart.<sid8>, `emit done` consumes it). The pink attn wash is invisible when the window is occluded (App Nap pauses renders) — which is exactly when the user needs the shoulder-tap. Gates in order: SUPERBOOST_PUSH=0 opt-out; 90s rate limit (SUPERBOOST_PUSH_MIN_GAP); SUPERBOOST_PUSH_DRYRUN=1 records intent for tests; frontmost-terminal suppression via lsappinfo (SUPERBOOST_PUSH=2 forces); macOS-only, silent no-op elsewhere. NO new settings wiring — rides the v5.3 Notification/UserPromptSubmit/Stop bindings.

v5.4.0 THREE BUDGETS: RAM was the only budget with a feedback loop; now rate-limit and context have one too. The statusline stashes live session stats (ctx|5h|7d|cost|dir, change-gated + atomic, fx/stats.<sid8>); the existing UserPromptSubmit --turn hook reads the stash and injects ONE actionable line per threshold crossing — 5h>=80%: tier down to sonnet/haiku, narrow fan-out, batch work; ctx>=80%: checkpoint durable state, delegate exploration, /compact at a natural boundary. Hysteresis via fx/warned.<sid8> (re-arm below 70), silent otherwise — same zero-ceremony contract as the v5.2 live budget. Plus a 7d weekly-quota chip that appears ONLY >=70% (amber, red >=90) in the session-budget group.

v5.4.0 COST LEDGER + hyves CLI: SessionEnd (fx.sh clear) folds the final stats snapshot into logs/cost-ledger.tsv (date/sid/dir/cost; cost is cumulative per session so readers aggregate max-per-sid — duplicate folds harmless; crashed sessions folded best-effort at next clear before pruning). New hooks/hyves.sh single front door: status (boot mark + budgets), doctor [--full] (self-test verbatim + suites), stats [days] (per-day bar chart + per-project totals from the ledger), demo (cycle all FX washes), update (git pull --ff-only + re-bless + self-test), version. Suggested alias: hyves=~/.claude/hooks/hyves.sh. hyves.sh joins the bless TRACKED set and the banner self-test (13 scripts, 37 checks).

v5.4.0 TESTS: verify.sh 61->75 checks (stash content, 7d chip visible/hidden, --turn warn-once/silent-repeat/hysteresis re-arm, push dryrun + rate limit + opt-out, long-turn vs short-turn push, ledger fold + stats consumption, hyves version/stats smoke). Lesson re-learned and now doubly documented: a bare `exit` inside a t() eval string terminates the whole suite silently (use `! (...)`), and section-local variables must be defined IN the section — $P was defined two sections later and expanded empty, making one check pass vacuously (caught by instrumented re-run of the failing eval).
v5_3_changes: v5.3.0 VISUAL GRAMMAR (WP2): the statusline now obeys ONE documented grammar (CLAUDE.md §11 is law). Hue families mean exactly one thing (violet/gold=identity, green=confirmed, amber=caution/change, red=failed, cyan=parallelism, blue=information work, indigo=shipping, pink=needs-you, slate=neutral); role order identity -> workspace -> machine -> session budget -> activity (FX label pinned at the right edge); exactly three emphasis tiers (solid chip > tinted readout > dim context). Recolors enforcing it: search #a855f7->#0ea5e9 (violet is identity's), think #14b8a6->#2563eb (teal read as parallelism cyan). ctx>=85% escalates to a SOLID red alert chip (same tier as 200K+).

v5.3.0 LIFECYCLE FX (WP2): effects across the whole session, not just five tool events — turn (WORKING, blue, ttl 3) on UserPromptSubmit; join (cyan) on SubagentStop; attn (NEEDS YOU, pink #ec4899, ttl 45) on Notification permission_prompt/idle_prompt/agent_needs_input/elicitation_dialog; compact (amber) on PreCompact; error (hard red #dc2626) when a non-Bash tool breaks, riding PostToolUseFailure (current CC fires PostToolUse only on success — without this binding FAIL washes never fire live; benign Bash failures like grep exit 1 stay silent); LONG-TURN HEARTBEAT — an expired work-event leaves a faint drifting slate shimmer (never after done/attn, 15-min cap) so an active turn is visibly alive. Per-event TTLs in the palette; SUPERBOOST_FX_TTL still overrides. SessionEnd keeps CLEAR (a fade is unseeable — the TUI exits; hygiene wins). statusLine.refreshInterval:1 keeps motion + attn alive while idle (event-driven renders stop exactly when Claude waits on you).

v5.3.0 SESSION-SCOPED ATOMIC FX STATE: hooks key state by stdin session_id -> fx/state.<sid8>; manual emits use the global file; the statusline renders the NEWEST record for its own session. Concurrent sessions no longer clobber each other's effects (one session's Stop/SessionEnd used to erase the other's live wash); clear removes only its own file and prunes stale siblings (4h). All writes are tmp+rename ATOMIC — the old truncate-then-write tore 15% of concurrent statusline reads (measured 5852/37811).

v5.3.0 REVIEW FIX PASS (WP1, adversarially verified, 17 CONFIRMED defects): (1) fx state torn reads -> atomic writes; (2) macOS swap parse read the word 'used' ($4, always 0 — the swap block NEVER fired) -> $6; (3) Linux /proc/swaps summed Size-Used = FREE swap -> would PERMANENTLY block spawns on any box with an empty swap partition -> sum Used; threshold 100MB->4GB (RESOURCE_MAX_SWAP_MB); (4) `| awk || echo` fallbacks never fire on empty-awk-success -> invalid JSON ('memory_pressure_pct':,) -> all numeric fields defaulted; (5) bc prints '.5' for sub-1GB -> invalid JSON -> resource-guard FAILED OPEN at exactly the low-RAM moment it guards -> awk with %.1f; (6) CLAUDE_PROCS hard-block contradicted its own 'informational only' note and counted 11 unrelated Claude.app/MCP procs -> block removed, count stays in JSON; (7) dangling --min-agents looped forever (failed shift 2) + a following flag was swallowed as the count; (8) non-ASCII model display_name violated the width law (emoji rendered 116/115 cells) -> MODEL/EFFORT sanitized like CWD; (9) comma-decimal locales made printf reject '4.56' -> LC_ALL=C; (10) malformed state fields (ttl/RGB junk) leaked stderr ~3x/sec incl. an awk string-compare div-by-zero -> every field validated, bad = no-FX; (11) non-integer COLUMNS ('80x') crashed the width math and the <40 clamp itself errored -> validated before arithmetic; (12) empty-string display_name shifted every tab-separated field left -> jq empty->sentinel; (13) install.sh hardcoded v5.2.1 (drift) -> reads manifest; stale '. Do NOT' banner-pattern -> '. Open your'; (14) banner dead code (LOAD_AVG/TOTAL_GB); (15) ram-monitor Linux div-by-zero on missing MemTotal; (16) verify.sh banner check false-failed on ANY warn (incl. intentional mid-edit drift) -> only hard FAIL: lines fail it; (17) deepcap decay check was a coin flip (mid window sampled the v5.2.2 hold plateau, observed early 8.2 vs mid 8.2) -> mid window 4.0-5.5s where ease sits ~50%.

v5.3.0 CLASSIFIER ROBUSTNESS: PostToolUse result read as tool_response // tool_output // response (docs renamed the field; runtime shipped tool_response); resp_failed() kept as the fallback for older CC that delivered failures on PostToolUse. Schema facts verified against code.claude.com docs (session_id in all hook + statusline stdin; Notification notification_type values; PreCompact trigger_reason; SessionEnd end_reason; no CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env var).

v5.3.0 TESTS: verify.sh 40->55 checks (session scoping, per-event ttl, notify mapping, PostToolUseFailure fail/error/silent split, recolors, newest-wins, scoped clear, heartbeat on/off, ctx alert chip, role order, junk-COLUMNS clamp, empty model name, resource-check JSON validity + leading-digit available_gb + alarm-guarded dangling-arg); deepcap grew a frame-captured heartbeat suite (width law, lit cells, wall-clock drift, black after done) and masks heartbeat cells in the expired check (post-TTL canvas must hold ZERO effect-colored energy). Render measured ~63ms real (78ms incl. ~15ms python harness overhead), budget <80ms.
v5_2_changes: v5.2.2 DISPLAY HYGIENE (2026-07-03, user screenshot): the 5h rate chip rendered raw harness float noise ('5h 7.000000000000001%') — ctx/5h percentages are now rounded to 1 decimal inside the single jq pass (try/catch keeps the '-' sentinel for missing values; 42.5 keeps its meaningful decimal).

v5.2.2 WASH VISIBILITY (2026-07-03, user screenshot-verified): the FX wash was too timid to act as visual confirmation — the pure g^1.5 spatial falloff left the far half of a wide (~250-col) canvas black even at full strength, and the smoothstep decay was near-black by mid-life while the label chip stayed lit to TTL, so a COMMIT glanced at t+5s read as 'label, no confirmation'. Fixes: (1) FLOORED falloff base=0.35+0.65*g^1.5 — every canvas cell participates; (2) HOLD-then-ease decay — full strength for the first 35% of TTL, then smoothstep to 0 at TTL (still strictly falling); (3) alpha levels 18/36/56/80 -> 20/40/62/82. Measured (COLUMNS=250): lit fraction 100% at 0-2s (was: left 2/3 black), 80% at 4s, 55% at 5s (was: black), 0 by TTL. deepcap grew a full-canvas-coverage check (min lit fraction over ages<2s >= 90%). DEEPCAP + verify.sh ALL PASS after.

v5.2.1 REBRAND (2026-07-03, user-requested): the product is now HYVES CODE V5 — GitHub repo renamed superboost-v5 -> hyves-code (old URLs redirect), README/CLAUDE.md/installer/boot-cinema link rebranded, context sentinel changed to 'HYVES CODE V5 ACTIVE' (CLAUDE.md accepts the old sentinel for pre-rebrand sessions). Internal script filenames, SUPERBOOST_* env vars, and settings.json wiring are UNCHANGED — upgrade is a git pull, no rewiring. Plus a visible BOOT MARK: the SessionStart hook now supplies a two-line HYVES CODE banner (self-test, RAM, health, fan-out posture) that the model opens its first reply with — the boot cinema itself stays installer-only (hook stdout is model context and can never paint the terminal).

v5.2.1 REGRESSION PASS (2026-07-03, frame-capture verified): (1) FX CANVAS FLOOR — the v5.2 density chips left a 9-cell wash canvas at COLUMNS=150, so scanner/sweep motion read as mush (the Gaussian head, sigma>=2, was as wide as the stage); the statusline now guarantees an 18-cell FX stage STATICALLY — shrink RAM bar, then shed churn, then dir — independent of FX state so the layout never shifts mid-effect. (2) FLOAT EMIT EPOCH — fx.sh wrote integer `date +%s`, starting every animation phase up to 1s late (the commit sweep began mid-canvas with up to 1/3 of its travel gone); it now writes a perl Time::HiRes float (integer fallback) and the statusline gates on the whole-second part. (3) Ambient glow dims 45%->35% while a scanner/sweep head travels, so the head reads crisply. Measured after: sweep monotonic 1-3-7-10-13-16-18-20 across 3s; scanner full-range bounce 1->21->1, moved 11/11 frames, coverage 0.83-0.92, zero freezes; decay 7.0 -> 2.9 -> 0.0 with 0.0 energy past TTL; width exactly COLUMNS-5 in all 66 frames; render ~57ms (target <80ms).

v5.2.1 TEST HARNESS: new tests/deepcap.py deep animation suite (width law, decay-to-zero, sweep monotonicity, scanner glide — ~25s, exit-coded); fxcap.py wash-run selection is now label-anchored — max-energy selection let the RAM bar masquerade as the wash (its left cells are literally commit-green, t=1.0) and the label chip's pad space joined the run and pinned argmax; verify.sh grew canvas-floor and float-epoch checks (now 40-case guard matrix + 24 named checks). Fresh-boot verified via nested `claude -p`: banner quoted, budget_mode touched, planted FX state cleared by SessionEnd; boot decrypt resolve monotonic 0.01->1.0 over 48 PTY frames.

v5.2.1 FIX (frame-capture verified): animation phases moved to a FLOAT clock (perl Time::HiRes, integer fallback) — integer `date +%s` froze motion to 1 fps between Claude Code's ~300ms renders and made the scanner teleport (~126deg/step). Scanner re-timed to 1.8 rad/s (~3.5s bounce); base glow dims to 45% while a scanner/sweep head travels so motion reads. Verified: commit sweep monotonic (1-3-7-10-13-16 / 3s), scanner glides full-range with bounce, decay strictly falling (6.51-4.67-2.06-0.00), render ~56ms.
BRAND: statusline chip now reads 'HYVES CODE V5' (HYVES = Holistic Yield & Validation Engines, an ISYNCSO brand)

LIVE BUDGET (review P1): new UserPromptSubmit hook `superboost-parallelism.sh --turn` re-injects the parallelism budget into context the moment the fan-out posture changes mid-session (wide<->balanced<->narrow<->solo); silent on unchanged turns, so zero token ceremony. Fixes the stale SessionStart-only budget.

FX OUTCOMES (review P4): superboost-fx.sh now reads the PostToolUse tool_response — test/build/lint/typecheck commands emit PASS (bright green) or FAIL (soft red) washes based on the actual result, not just 'a tool ran'
FX PERF (review P5): quiet tools (Read/Grep/Glob/...) skip the python classifier via a bash gate — PostToolUse overhead for them drops ~40ms -> ~7ms

FX MOTION (fx-research): event-typed statusline animation — fanout/deploy washes carry a Larson scanner, commit a one-shot L->R sweep; wash gained a 1D plasma shimmer; linear decay + 4-frame pulse table replaced by smoothstep ease-out + a <10% sine pulse (~0.4 Hz, WCAG 2.3.1-safe). All motion is a pure function of wall-clock, so paused frames are valid stills.

STATUSLINE DENSITY (review P3): new chips from the session JSON — workspace dir basename (ASCII-sanitized), diff churn +N/-N, and a red 200K+ flag when the session exceeds 200k tokens; fractional ctx% no longer mis-colors red (B3)

HYVES BOOT CINEMA (fx-research #1): new hooks/hyves-boot.sh — an nms/Sneakers-style decrypt reveal of the HYVES CODE logo for installer/first-boot moments: alt-screen + hidden cursor + trap restore, DECSET 2026 synchronized-output frames, phosphor-green resolve, live self-test status line, OSC 8 repo hyperlink. Degrades to one plain line on non-TTY/NO_COLOR/narrow. NEVER wired as a session hook (hook stdout is model context; the TUI owns the terminal).

SAFETY-GUARD (review B1/B2/B4/P6, user-approved): rm -rf now also catches quoted/trailing-slash home targets ('$HOME', $HOME/, ~/); `git push +refspec` force-updates are blocked; .env.local/.env.production and other real .env variants are protected (.example/.sample/.template stay writable); calculator-locked files are now also guarded on the Bash path (redirects, tee, sed -i, cp/mv/rm) — read-only access unaffected
SELF-TEST (review P2): banner now verifies jq presence, the PostToolUse superboost-fx binding, and the UserPromptSubmit live-budget binding (three silent-failure gaps)
FX HYGIENE (review P7): Stop hook emits a slate DONE wash at end of turn; SessionEnd clears FX state so no stale effect leaks into the next session's first render
Integrity: hyves-boot.sh added to checksum tracking
v5_1_changes: STATUSLINE v5.1: full-width HUD painted with truecolor BACKGROUNDS — brand/model+effort chips (gold for Fable), wide green->amber->red RAM gradient bar, new ctx-used% / 5h-rate readouts; claims the entire terminal width (COLUMNS from the hook env, minus safety margin)

FX WASHES: active effects flood the free canvas with a quantized, dithered background wash in the effect color (3-cell 'pixels', distance falloff, per-second shimmer, pulse + TTL decay); base strip tints toward the effect so the whole bar breathes; duration tunable via SUPERBOOST_FX_TTL (default 7s)
FIX: safety-guard.sh now fires the red BLOCKED effect itself on a denial (documented since v5.0 but unwired — PostToolUse never runs for a denied call)

FIX: deploy effect false-positives — indigo now requires a real deploy (platform CLI, git push, package-manager deploy task, or a deploy script in command position), not any command merely containing the word 'deploy'
FIX: narrow terminals get a hard-truncated compact line instead of a wrapped bar
Width safety unchanged: visible glyphs pure ASCII, all color zero-width SGR (fg+bg); SUPERBOOST_STATUSLINE_PLAIN=1 escape hatch intact
v5_changes: RETUNED for Claude Fable 5: settings default model -> fable[1m] + availableModels allowlist [fable,opus,sonnet] (blocked default degrades to opus with a warning, not a hard fail)
MODEL TIERING: orchestrator/synthesizer/judge now = fable (was opus); worker=sonnet, explorer=haiku unchanged

DOCTRINE: added Fable-5 prompting doctrine to CLAUDE.md §9 — dependable async sub-agents (delegate + keep working), state-the-objective + the Why, grounded progress claims, no-tidying at high effort, longer minutes-long turns, memory surface, effort sweep
REFUSAL AWARENESS: CLAUDE.md documents the Fable-5 cyber/bio classifier + Claude Code's built-in Opus 4.8 fallback so a refusal is understood, not mistaken for a failure

RAM->PARALLELISM: new superboost-parallelism.sh turns the RAM probe into an actionable fan-out budget (concurrent agents + workflow width + mode); the SessionStart banner now EMITS the budget into context so the orchestrator sizes fan-out to free memory — wide when RAM is ample, solo when tight (a capability plain Fable-5-on-Claude-Code does not offer)

TERMINAL FX: new superboost-fx.sh event emitter (PostToolUse + manual `emit`) writes short-lived colored-effect state (no stdout — zero context pollution); the statusline renders it as a decaying colored activity segment (preflight=blue, fan-out=cyan, commit=green, deploy=indigo, blocked=red, edit=amber, search=violet)

STATUSLINE: now COLORIZED (ANSI truecolor SGR only, no wide/ambiguous-width glyphs so width calc stays exact) with a RAM gradient bar, colored model/cost/capacity, and the live FX segment. SUPERBOOST_STATUSLINE_PLAIN=1 reverts to pure ASCII (honors the v4 width-safety caution).
Rebranded v4.0 -> v5.0; aligned banner, CLAUDE.md, statusline, README, version.json
Integrity: superboost-fx.sh + superboost-parallelism.sh added to checksum tracking
v4_changes: Rebranded v3.x -> v4.0; aligned banner, CLAUDE.md, statusline, version.json
SECURITY: safety-guard.sh PreToolUse hook hard-blocks catastrophic/exfil actions + enforces the calculator lock
FIX: resource-guard.sh exits 2 to actually block (was exit 1, a no-op)
FIX: statusline pure ASCII (removed ANSI + emoji that corrupted TUI width calc)
FIX: removed dead Fast-Mode logic; gitnexus-refresh cwd-guarded, no auto-exec; ram-monitor rotates its log
Model tiering alias-only; config is a git repo
